---
title: "Raby"
---

## Raby

### Description

Perhaps a Winchester nurse who attended Gertrude Walter, Marianne Bigg Wither and CMY

### Biography

She or he is not found as nurse or doctor under that name in directories.

### Letters

- [To Marianne Bigg Wither, March 17 [1899]](../letters/3399_To_Marianne_Bigg_Wither.html)
- Letter from May 20, 1897.
- Letter from Novr 22 [1896][[footnote:1]]
- Letter from Aug 11th 1893

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
